top_signals.title: New Iconic Landmark Danjiang Bridge Opened to Redefine Taiwan
top_signals.summary: The Danjiang Bridge, one of Taiwan’s most significant recent public infrastructure projects, officially opened with a series of large-scale public events, transforming the bridge into a new cultural landmark and civic space. The program featured the “Danjiang Bridge Together Arts Festival,” immersive public activities, and a special performance of Light Chain by Cloud Gate Dance [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
